# Chart

**Status:** Stable  
**Category:** peers  
**Import:** `drawui`  
**Emitted class(es):** `Rectangle`, `chart-ui-component`

Chart.js-backed visualization panel used by `DrawUI.Chart()`.

## Import

```js
import { Chart } from "drawui";
```

## Examples

### Bar

```js
return makeChart({
    type: "bar",
    data: {
      labels: CHART_LABELS,
      datasets: [
        {
          label: "Tickets",
          data: [12, 19, 8, 15, 22],
          backgroundColor: CHART_PALETTE[0],
          borderColor: CHART_BORDERS[0],
          borderWidth: 1,
        },
      ],
    },
  });
```

<div class="doc-live-demo" data-live-demo="Chart/bar" aria-label="Live preview"></div>

### Horizontal bar

```js
return makeChart({
    type: "bar",
    data: {
      labels: ["Design", "Build", "Test", "Ship"],
      datasets: [
        {
          label: "Hours",
          data: [32, 48, 24, 16],
          backgroundColor: CHART_PALETTE[1],
          borderColor: CHART_BORDERS[1],
          borderWidth: 1,
        },
      ],
    },
    options: {
      indexAxis: "y",
    },
  });
```

<div class="doc-live-demo" data-live-demo="Chart/horizontal-bar" aria-label="Live preview"></div>

### Stacked bar

```js
return makeChart({
    type: "bar",
    data: {
      labels: CHART_LABELS,
      datasets: [
        {
          label: "Open",
          data: [8, 11, 5, 9, 12],
          backgroundColor: CHART_PALETTE[0],
          borderColor: CHART_BORDERS[0],
          borderWidth: 1,
        },
        {
          label: "Closed",
          data: [4, 8, 3, 6, 10],
          backgroundColor: CHART_PALETTE[1],
          borderColor: CHART_BORDERS[1],
          borderWidth: 1,
        },
      ],
    },
    options: {
      scales: {
        x: { stacked: true },
        y: { stacked: true },
      },
    },
  });
```

<div class="doc-live-demo" data-live-demo="Chart/stacked-bar" aria-label="Live preview"></div>

### Line

```js
return makeChart({
    type: "line",
    data: {
      labels: CHART_LABELS,
      datasets: [
        {
          label: "Latency (ms)",
          data: [42, 38, 51, 45, 33],
          borderColor: CHART_BORDERS[0],
          backgroundColor: CHART_PALETTE[0],
          tension: 0.3,
        },
      ],
    },
  });
```

<div class="doc-live-demo" data-live-demo="Chart/line" aria-label="Live preview"></div>

### Multi-series line

```js
return makeChart({
    type: "line",
    data: {
      labels: CHART_LABELS,
      datasets: [
        {
          label: "API",
          data: [42, 38, 51, 45, 33],
          borderColor: CHART_BORDERS[0],
          backgroundColor: CHART_PALETTE[0],
          tension: 0.3,
        },
        {
          label: "UI",
          data: [28, 31, 27, 34, 29],
          borderColor: CHART_BORDERS[1],
          backgroundColor: CHART_PALETTE[1],
          tension: 0.3,
        },
      ],
    },
  });
```

<div class="doc-live-demo" data-live-demo="Chart/multi-series-line" aria-label="Live preview"></div>

### Area

```js
return makeChart({
    type: "line",
    data: {
      labels: CHART_LABELS,
      datasets: [
        {
          label: "Active users",
          data: [120, 145, 132, 168, 190],
          borderColor: CHART_BORDERS[2],
          backgroundColor: "rgba(220, 220, 170, 0.35)",
          fill: true,
          tension: 0.35,
        },
      ],
    },
  });
```

<div class="doc-live-demo" data-live-demo="Chart/area" aria-label="Live preview"></div>

### Pie

```js
return makeChart({
    type: "pie",
    data: {
      labels: ["Docs", "Code", "Review", "Meetings", "Other"],
      datasets: [
        {
          data: [28, 35, 18, 12, 7],
          backgroundColor: CHART_PALETTE,
          borderColor: CHART_BORDERS,
          borderWidth: 1,
        },
      ],
    },
  });
```

<div class="doc-live-demo" data-live-demo="Chart/pie" aria-label="Live preview"></div>

### Doughnut

```js
return makeChart({
    type: "doughnut",
    data: {
      labels: ["Passed", "Failed", "Skipped"],
      datasets: [
        {
          data: [72, 18, 10],
          backgroundColor: [CHART_PALETTE[1], CHART_PALETTE[3], CHART_PALETTE[2]],
          borderColor: [CHART_BORDERS[1], CHART_BORDERS[3], CHART_BORDERS[2]],
          borderWidth: 1,
        },
      ],
    },
  });
```

<div class="doc-live-demo" data-live-demo="Chart/doughnut" aria-label="Live preview"></div>

### Polar area

```js
return makeChart({
    type: "polarArea",
    data: {
      labels: ["Speed", "Reliability", "UX", "Docs", "Support"],
      datasets: [
        {
          data: [11, 16, 14, 9, 12],
          backgroundColor: CHART_PALETTE,
          borderColor: CHART_BORDERS,
          borderWidth: 1,
        },
      ],
    },
  });
```

<div class="doc-live-demo" data-live-demo="Chart/polar-area" aria-label="Live preview"></div>

### Radar

```js
return makeChart({
    type: "radar",
    data: {
      labels: ["Speed", "Reliability", "UX", "Docs", "Support"],
      datasets: [
        {
          label: "Current",
          data: [65, 78, 72, 55, 68],
          borderColor: CHART_BORDERS[0],
          backgroundColor: "rgba(86, 156, 214, 0.25)",
        },
        {
          label: "Target",
          data: [80, 85, 80, 75, 80],
          borderColor: CHART_BORDERS[1],
          backgroundColor: "rgba(78, 201, 176, 0.2)",
        },
      ],
    },
  });
```

<div class="doc-live-demo" data-live-demo="Chart/radar" aria-label="Live preview"></div>

### Scatter

```js
return makeChart({
    type: "scatter",
    data: {
      datasets: [
        {
          label: "Samples",
          data: [
            { x: 2, y: 14 },
            { x: 4, y: 9 },
            { x: 6, y: 18 },
            { x: 8, y: 12 },
            { x: 10, y: 22 },
            { x: 12, y: 16 },
          ],
          backgroundColor: CHART_PALETTE[0],
          borderColor: CHART_BORDERS[0],
        },
      ],
    },
    options: {
      scales: {
        x: { title: { display: true, text: "Effort" } },
        y: { title: { display: true, text: "Impact" } },
      },
    },
  });
```

<div class="doc-live-demo" data-live-demo="Chart/scatter" aria-label="Live preview"></div>

### Bubble

```js
return makeChart({
    type: "bubble",
    data: {
      datasets: [
        {
          label: "Initiatives",
          data: [
            { x: 20, y: 30, r: 8 },
            { x: 35, y: 45, r: 14 },
            { x: 50, y: 25, r: 10 },
            { x: 65, y: 55, r: 18 },
            { x: 80, y: 40, r: 12 },
          ],
          backgroundColor: CHART_PALETTE[4],
          borderColor: CHART_BORDERS[4],
        },
      ],
    },
    options: {
      scales: {
        x: { title: { display: true, text: "Cost" } },
        y: { title: { display: true, text: "Value" } },
      },
    },
  });
```

<div class="doc-live-demo" data-live-demo="Chart/bubble" aria-label="Live preview"></div>

### Bar + line

```js
return makeChart({
    data: {
      labels: CHART_LABELS,
      datasets: [
        {
          type: "bar",
          label: "Volume",
          data: [12, 19, 8, 15, 22],
          backgroundColor: CHART_PALETTE[0],
          borderColor: CHART_BORDERS[0],
          borderWidth: 1,
          order: 2,
        },
        {
          type: "line",
          label: "Trend",
          data: [10, 14, 12, 16, 20],
          borderColor: CHART_BORDERS[3],
          backgroundColor: CHART_PALETTE[3],
          tension: 0.3,
          order: 1,
        },
      ],
    },
  });
```

<div class="doc-live-demo" data-live-demo="Chart/bar-line" aria-label="Live preview"></div>
